title: The Vague Clause That Helps Explain the U.S.-Iran Fight Over the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran has done little to calm tension, in part because they disagree on what it actually means.
summary_public: The memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran has done little to calm tension, in part because they disagree on what it actually means.
